class.name: GDRESettings
class.brief_description: Global settings and state for an active Godot RE Tools session.
class.description: [GDRESettings] holds all state for the currently loaded project session. It manages loading and unloading PCK, APK, ZIP, EXE, or loose-directory bundles; tracks encryption keys and custom decryptors; enumerates project files; and exposes project metadata. Most other GDRE API classes depend on a project being loaded through [GDRESettings] first. [GDRESettings] is registered as an engine singleton. Retrieve it from GDScript with [code]Engine.get_singleton("GDRESettings")[/code]; only one project can be loaded at a time. [codeblock] var settings = Engine.get_singleton("GDRESettings") settings.set_encryption_key_string("000102030405060708090A0B0C0D0E0F101112131415161718191A1B1C1D1E1F") var err = settings.load_project(PackedStringArray(["/path/to/game.pck"])) if err != OK: push_error("Failed to load project") return print("Engine: ", settings.get_version_string()) settings.unload_project() [/codeblock]

method.name: add_remap
method.description: Adds a remap entry that redirects requests for [param src] to [param dst]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: are_imports_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] once [method load_import_files] has populated the session's import metadata. This is [code]false[/code] until a project is loaded and imports have been scanned.

method.name: close_log_file
method.description: Closes the log file previously opened with [method open_log_file]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: get_auto_display_scale
method.description: Returns the automatically detected display scale factor for the current screen, used to size the standalone GUI on high-DPI displays.

method.name: get_custom_decryption_script_path
method.description: Returns the filesystem path of the script registered with [method set_custom_decryption_script], or an empty string if none is set.

method.name: get_custom_decryptor
method.description: Returns the currently registered [CustomDecryptor], or [code]null[/code] if none is set.

method.name: get_cwd
method.description: Returns the current working directory of the GDRE process.

method.name: get_disclaimer_text
method.description: Returns the full legal disclaimer shown in the About dialog and at the top of CLI help output.

method.name: get_dotnet_assembly_path
method.description: Returns the path to the primary .NET assembly (.dll) for the loaded C# project, or an empty string if the project is not a C# project or no assembly was located.

method.name: get_dotnet_decompiler
method.description: Returns the helper object used to decompile .NET assemblies belonging to the loaded project, or [code]null[/code] if .NET decompilation is not applicable.

method.name: get_encryption_key
method.description: Returns the currently set encryption key as a [PackedByteArray] (16, 24, or 32 bytes). Returns an empty array if no key is set.

method.name: get_encryption_key_string
method.description: Returns the currently set encryption key as a hexadecimal string, or an empty string if no key is set.

method.name: get_errors
method.description: Returns the list of errors collected during the current session and clears the internal buffer. Use this to display errors in a UI or log file after long-running operations.

method.name: get_exec_dir
method.description: Returns the directory that contains the GDRE Tools executable.

method.name: get_file_count
method.description: Returns the total number of files in the loaded project, across all loaded packs.

method.name: get_file_info_array
method.description: Returns an [Array] of [PackedFileInfo] entries, one per file in the loaded project. If [param filters] is non-empty, only files whose [code]res://[/code]-rooted paths match one of the glob patterns in [param filters] are returned.

method.name: get_file_list
method.description: Returns the [code]res://[/code]-rooted paths of all files in the loaded project. If [param filters] is non-empty, only paths matching one of the glob patterns in [param filters] (e.g. [code]res://**/*.gdc[/code]) are returned.

method.name: get_game_app_version
method.description: Returns the application version declared by the loaded project (typically from [code]application/config/version[/code] in the project config), or an empty string if none is set.

method.name: get_game_name
method.description: Returns the game name declared in the loaded project config (typically from [code]application/config/name[/code]).

method.name: get_gdre_resource_path
method.description: Returns the [code]res://[/code]-rooted filesystem path GDRE uses for its own bundled resources.

method.name: get_gdre_tmp_path
method.description: Returns the path to GDRE's temporary working directory (per-user, auto-cleaned).

method.name: get_gdre_user_path
method.description: Returns the path to GDRE's persistent user data directory (logs, configuration).

method.name: get_gdre_version
method.description: Returns the version string of GDRE Tools itself.

method.name: get_home_dir
method.description: Returns the current user's home directory path.

method.name: get_import_files
method.description: Returns an [Array] of all [ImportInfo] objects loaded for the current project. If [param copy] is [code]true[/code], each entry is a deep copy; otherwise the returned references point at the same objects GDRE uses internally, so mutations are reflected across the session.

method.name: get_import_info_by_dest
method.description: Returns the [ImportInfo] whose destination files include [param p_path] (an engine-side [code]res://[/code] path), or [code]null[/code] if no import produces that file.

method.name: get_import_info_by_source
method.description: Returns the [ImportInfo] whose source file matches [param p_path], or [code]null[/code] if no matching import is registered.

method.name: get_log_file_path
method.description: Returns the filesystem path of the log file currently opened by [method open_log_file], or an empty string if no log file is open.

method.name: get_pack_info_list
method.description: Returns an array of [PackInfo] entries, one per pack currently loaded (PCK, APK, ZIP, EXE, or directory).

method.name: get_pack_path
method.description: Returns the filesystem path of the primary pack that was loaded. This returns a valid path for every [PackInfo.PackType], including [code]DIR[/code] (in which case it is the directory path).

method.name: get_pack_type
method.description: Returns the [enum PackInfo.PackType] of the primary loaded pack.

method.name: get_project_config_path
method.description: Returns the [code]res://[/code]-rooted path of the loaded project configuration file ([code]project.godot[/code] for Godot 3/4 or [code]engine.cfg[/code] for Godot 2), or an empty string if none was located.

method.name: get_project_dotnet_assembly_name
method.description: Returns the name of the C# assembly declared by the loaded project, or an empty string for non-C# projects.

method.name: get_project_path
method.description: Returns the filesystem path GDRE treats as the root of the loaded project. For loose-directory loads this is the directory itself; for archives this is the directory containing the pack file.

method.name: get_project_setting
method.description: Returns the value of the project configuration setting [param p_setting] (e.g. [code]application/config/name[/code]) from the loaded project. Returns [param default_value] if the setting is not present.

method.name: get_recent_error_string
method.description: Returns a single string containing the errors collected since the last call, joined with newlines. If [param filter_backtraces] is [code]true[/code], native backtrace lines are stripped to keep the output user-friendly.

method.name: get_remaps
method.description: Returns a [Dictionary] mapping original resource paths to their remapped destinations. When [param include_imports] is [code]true[/code] (the default), the import-generated remaps (e.g. [code]*.png.import[/code] -> [code]*.ctex[/code]) are included alongside explicit remaps.

method.name: get_sys_info_string
method.description: Returns a human-readable summary of GDRE and the host system (OS, CPU, GDRE version, Godot version). Used in the About dialog and bug-report output.

method.name: get_temp_dotnet_assembly_dir
method.description: Returns the temporary directory used to stage extracted .NET assemblies for the loaded project, or an empty string if one has not been created.

method.name: get_ver_major
method.description: Returns the major engine version of the loaded project (e.g. [code]4[/code] for Godot 4.x).

method.name: get_ver_minor
method.description: Returns the minor engine version of the loaded project.

method.name: get_ver_rev
method.description: Returns the patch/revision engine version of the loaded project.

method.name: get_version_string
method.description: Returns the full engine version string of the loaded project (e.g. [code]"4.3.0"[/code]).

method.name: globalize_path
method.description: Converts a [code]res://[/code] path [param p_path] relative to [param resource_path] into an absolute filesystem path inside the loaded project. Returns [param p_path] unchanged if it is already absolute.

method.name: had_encryption_error
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if any encryption-related error occurred since the last [method load_project] call (e.g. wrong key, missing custom decryptor).

method.name: has_any_remaps
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if at least one remap has been registered (either explicitly or via import metadata).

method.name: has_loaded_dotnet_assembly
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a .NET assembly has been successfully located and loaded for the current project.

method.name: has_path_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the given [code]res://[/code]-rooted path [param p_path] exists in the loaded project.

method.name: has_project_setting
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the project configuration contains a setting named [param p_setting].

method.name: has_remap
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a remap entry redirecting [param src] to [param dst] is currently registered.

method.name: is_headless
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if GDRE is running in headless mode (no display server). Most CLI workflows run headless.

method.name: is_pack_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if a project is currently loaded.

method.name: is_project_config_loaded
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the project configuration ([code]project.godot[/code] / [code]engine.cfg[/code]) has been parsed and is available via [method get_project_setting].

method.name: load_import_file
method.description: Loads a single [code].import[/code] metadata file at [param p_path] into the session. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: load_import_files
method.description: Scans the loaded project for [code].import[/code] files and populates the session's import metadata. Called automatically by [method load_project] when loading interactively, but skipped when [method load_project] is invoked with [code]cmd_line_extract = true[/code] (raw-extraction mode does not need import metadata). Call this manually to refresh import state.

method.name: load_project
method.description: Loads a project from one or more PCK, APK, ZIP, EXE, or directory paths. Pass multiple paths to load multi-part archives (e.g. a main PCK plus split DLC PCKs). Set [param cmd_line_extract] to [code]true[/code] when running in raw extraction mode: import metadata and project-config loading are skipped so only the pack's raw file table is available. Provide [param csharp_assembly_override] to manually point at a specific C# assembly when auto-detection picks the wrong one. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success or an error code on failure. Use [method get_errors] to retrieve a detailed error list.

method.name: load_project_config
method.description: Explicitly loads the project configuration ([code]project.godot[/code] or [code]engine.cfg[/code]) from the loaded project. Normally called automatically by [method load_project]; use this to re-parse the config after mutating it.

method.name: load_translation_key_hint_file
method.description: Loads a translation key hint file (typically a plain-text list of known source strings) that improves the accuracy of CSV translation recovery.

method.name: localize_path
method.description: Converts an absolute filesystem path [param p_path] into a [code]res://[/code]-rooted path relative to [param resource_path].

method.name: needs_post_load_patch_translation
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the loaded project requires translation patching (the [code]--patch-translations[/code] workflow) to produce usable CSV output.

method.name: open_log_file
method.description: Opens a log file inside [param output_dir] that receives all subsequent GDRE log messages. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: pack_has_project_config
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the loaded pack contains a project configuration file.

method.name: post_load_patch_translation
method.description: Runs the post-load translation patching step on the currently loaded project. Should only be called when [method needs_post_load_patch_translation] returns [code]true[/code].

method.name: project_requires_dotnet_assembly
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the loaded project is a C# (Godot Mono) project and therefore requires a matching .NET assembly.

method.name: remove_remap
method.description: Removes the remap entry [param src] -> [param dst]. If [param output_dir] is non-empty, the corresponding file on disk under [param output_dir] is also deleted. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: reset_custom_decryptor
method.description: Clears the currently registered [CustomDecryptor].

method.name: reset_encryption_key
method.description: Clears the currently set encryption key.

method.name: save_project_config
method.description: Writes the current project configuration to a text [code]project.godot[/code] (Godot 3/4) or [code]engine.cfg[/code] (Godot 2) file inside [param p_out_dir]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: save_project_config_binary
method.description: Writes the current project configuration to a binary [code]project.binary[/code] (Godot 3/4) or [code]engine.cfb[/code] (Godot 2) file inside [param p_out_dir]. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: set_custom_decryption_script
method.description: Loads a GDScript file at [param p_decryptor_script_path] that extends [CustomDecryptor] and registers it as the active custom decryptor. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: set_custom_decryptor
method.description: Registers an already-instantiated [CustomDecryptor] as the active decryptor for the session.

method.name: set_dotnet_assembly_path
method.description: Manually sets the path of the primary .NET assembly for the loaded project, overriding auto-detection.

method.name: set_encryption_key
method.description: Sets the encryption key from a raw byte array. Godot's standard AES-256 encryption requires 32 bytes; custom decryptors may accept 16 or 24 bytes for AES-128 or AES-192. Returns [code]OK[/code] if the key length is valid.

method.name: set_encryption_key_string
method.description: Sets the encryption key from a hexadecimal string (e.g. [code]"000102...1E1F"[/code] for 32 bytes). Returns [code]OK[/code] if the string decodes to a valid key length.

method.name: set_project_path
method.description: Overrides the project root directory. Normally set automatically by [method load_project].

method.name: set_project_setting
method.description: Sets the project configuration setting [param p_setting] to [param value] in the in-memory project config. Persist with [method save_project_config] or [method save_project_config_binary].

method.name: unload_project
method.description: Unloads the currently loaded project and frees all associated resources. Set [param no_reset_ephemeral] to [code]true[/code] to preserve ephemeral settings (such as the encryption key) across the unload. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success.

method.name: update_from_ephemeral_settings
method.description: Refreshes internal state from the current ephemeral [GDREConfig] settings. Called automatically after settings that can be changed via CLI flags are updated.
